title: My AI Memory Now Follows Me Across Every Tool!
summary: Walrus Memory is an external memory layer that persists context and memories across different AI agents and tools. It stores encrypted, user-owned memories that can be recalled by different AI providers without them knowing about each other, requiring only a single prompt to set up.
